name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for The Syllabus Sync
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-design"]
body:

- type: markdown
  attributes:
  value: | ## 💡 Feature Description
  A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added to The Syllabus Sync.

      ## 🎯 Problem Statement
      What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

      ## 💭 Proposed Solution
      Describe your proposed solution in detail. How do you envision this feature working?

      ## 🔄 User Stories / Use Cases
      Break down the feature into specific user stories:
      - **As a** [user type], **I want to** [action], **so that** [benefit]
      - **As a** [user type], **I want to** [action], **so that** [benefit]

      ## 🎨 UI/UX Design Ideas
      Sketch or describe the user interface. Include:
      - Screen layouts and components
      - User interaction patterns
      - Accessibility considerations
      - Mobile responsiveness

      ## 🔧 Technical Implementation Ideas
      Thoughts on technical implementation:
      - **API Changes**: New endpoints or modifications
      - **Database Schema**: Required table changes
      - **Component Architecture**: New components or changes
      - **State Management**: Store updates or new stores
      - **Security Considerations**: Authentication, authorization, data validation

      ## 🎭 Acceptance Criteria
      Define what "done" looks like:
      - [ ] User can [specific action]
      - [ ] Feature works on [platforms]
      - [ ] Accessibility standards met
      - [ ] Performance requirements satisfied
      - [ ] Tests pass with [coverage]% coverage

      ## 📊 Priority Assessment
      Help us prioritize this feature:
      - **Business Impact**: [low/medium/high/critical]
      - **User Value**: [low/medium/high/critical]
      - **Implementation Effort**: [small/medium/large/xlarge]
      - **Timeline Suggestion**: [this release/next release/future]

      ## 🚫 Alternatives Considered
      What other approaches or solutions did you consider? Why did you choose the proposed solution?

      ## 📚 References & Inspiration
      Links to similar features in other apps, design inspiration, or relevant documentation.

      ## 🏷️ Labels (optional)
      Suggest labels for this issue:
      - `type: enhancement`
      - `component: [component-name]`
      - `priority: [urgent/normal/low]`
      - `effort: [small/medium/large/xlarge]`
      - `status: [backlog/planned/in-progress/done]`
